title: Bliss SMP Duels
description: This Project adds a stripped down version of the bliss smp season 3 plugin.
body:
# ✨ BlissDuels

A gem-powered PvP plugin for Paper servers.

BlissDuels is built for fast-paced faction and duel gameplay where each player can shape their combat style through gem abilities. Instead of flat stat boosts, gems unlock active and passive mechanics that reward timing, positioning, and team coordination. Whether you want raw pressure, mobility, sustain, or utility, the gem system gives clear identity to every playstyle.

BlissDuels adds ability-driven combat using collectible gems like **Fire**, **Flux**, **Strength**, **Life**, **Speed**, **Puff**, **Wealth**, and **Astra**.

---
## ❗NOTE❗

This is a trimmed down, nerfed version of the bliss plugin to apeal to duel/pvp servers. This is **NOT** the real plugin but imstead a remake. There are no progressions, flux overcharge, events, or item tag. Also all gems are capped on Pristine +5

---
## 💎 Gem Overview

- **🔥 Fire** - Fire-focused combat with **Fire Resistance** and offensive tools like **Crisp**, **Fireball**, and **Meteor Shower**.
- **⚡ Flux** - Gem built around **watts/kinetic charge**, with **Kinetic Burst**, **Energy Beam**, **Ground**, and **Kinetic Overdrive**.
- **💪 Strength** - Melee control gem featuring **Bounty Hunter** tracking plus **Frailer**, **Nullify**, and **Chad Strength** for debuffing and damage spikes.
- **💚 Life** - Sustain/utility gem with survivability passives and life-control skills such as **Vitalaty Vortex**, **Heart Drainer/Heartlock**, and **Circle of Life**.
- **🌩️ Speed** - Movement gem with **Speed**, **Dolphin's Grace**, **Thunder Step/Blur**, and **Speedy Storm**.
- **☁️ Puff** - Air-control gem with **Fall Damage Immunity**, **Double Jump**, **Breezy Bash**, and **Dash**.
- **💰 Wealth** - Utility gem with **Luck/Hero of the Village**, extra resource gains, and combat utility via **Pockets**, **Unfortune**, and **Item Lock**.
- **🌌 Astra** - Space/void control gem with **Dimensional Drift**, **Phasing**, **Soul Healing/Capture**, and aggressive options like **Daggers** and astral abilities.

## 📦 Version

- **Plugin version:** `1.0`
- **API version:** `1.21.11`
- **Java:** `21`

## ⚔️ Features

- 💎 Tiered gem items (Tier 1 + Tier 2)
- 🔥 Unique ability listeners per gem type
- ⚡ Flux watt + kinetic charge mechanics
- 🤝 Trust system for ally-safe abilities
- 🛠️ Admin/debug commands for testing and setup

## 🚀 Installation (Server)

1. Build or download the jar.
2. Put it in your server `plugins/` folder.
3. Start/restart your Paper server.
4. Configure files in `plugins/BlissDuels/`.

## 🕹️ Commands

### Player / Utility

- `/trust <list|add|remove> [player]`
- `/watts`
- `/hiddenwatts`
- `/startcharging`
- `/stopcharging`
- `/chargemenu`

### Gem Access / Admin

- `/gem [reload]`
- `/getgem <gem|random|trader|upgrader|selector|selector1|selector2> [tier] [player]`
- `/maxwatts`
- `/resetwatts`
- `/reset-charge`
- `/dbg <power> <player>`

## 🔐 Permissions

- `blissgem.admin` (default: op)
- `blissgem.trust` (default: true)
